# Mekidulu - Premium Wood Cat Furniture

> Minimalist wood cat furniture designed for modern Western living. Direct-to-factory supply chain (OEM/ODM).

## Core Links
- [Products](https://mekidulu.com/products.html): Featured premium cat trees and furniture.
- [Assembly Guides](https://mekidulu.com/manuals.html): Technical PDFs and manuals for all models.
- [Contact/Quote](https://tally.so/r/D4XBBj): Direct inquiry for distributors.

## Brand Strengths
- 40% cost saving via direct supply chain.
- Focus on natural wood aesthetics (New Zealand Pine).
- Global logistics support for US, Japan, and Europe.

## Technical Documentation
- All model assembly instructions are hosted under /manuals/ directory.
